changedLines.originalText: I'm gonna just telepathically say to Yolo, we've practiced this twice now, by the third time, we're gonna be brilliant.

changedLines.originalText: Says Justice, that's what happened last time, too.

changedLines.originalText: Justice will smash his battleaxe against his shield as loudly as he can, and bellow, show yourself.
changedLines.cleanedText: Justas will smash his battleaxe against his shield as loudly as he can, and bellow, show yourself.

changedLines.originalText: The reason I've been saving my charges on my magic item is I want to use all 5 charges to learn 3 true facts about Zephya's minion.
